Name: UPaperTerrainComponent
Description:
The terrain visualization component for an associated spline component.
  This takes a 2D terrain material and instances sprite geometry along the spline path.

Variables.Name: TerrainMaterial
Variables.Description: The terrain material to apply to this component (set of rules for which sprites are used on different surfaces or the interior)

Variables.Name: RandomSeed
Variables.Description: Random seed used for choosing which spline meshes to use.

Variables.Name: TerrainColor
Variables.Description: The color of the terrain (passed to the sprite material as a vertex color)

Variables.Name: ReparamStepsPerSegment
Variables.Description: Number of steps per spline segment to place in the reparameterization table

Variables.Name: CollisionThickness
Variables.Description: The extrusion thickness of collision geometry when using a 3D collision domain
